name: Tonkatsu Tamafuji
tagline: Kaimuki's tonkatsu master — perfectly fried heritage pork cutlets with house-ground cabbage and secret dipping sauce.
parking: Street parking on Waialae Ave; small lot behind
talkStory: Run by a Japanese chef who trained in Tokyo tonkatsu houses before opening this Kaimuki spot, Tamafuji serves what many locals consider the best tonkatsu on Oahu. The pork cutlets use premium heritage pork, breaded in ultra-fine panko and fried to impossibly crispy perfection while staying juicy inside. The house-ground cabbage is fluffy and the dipping sauce recipe is closely guarded. Lunch lines form early — arrive by 11:30am or expect a 30-minute wait.
